Description: This is a small-signal, surface-mount N-channel MOSFET designed for high-efficiency power switching and management. It features low on-resistance, fast switching speed, and low input capacitance, making it suitable for applications like motor control, power management, and backlighting in portable and space-constrained designs.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal. Voltage applied here controls the conduction between Drain and Source.
Output / Load terminal. Connects to the positive side of the load or power supply.
Common / Ground terminal. Typically connected to circuit ground.
